sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. New mineral deposits discovered. The colony feels hopeful. My improvisation grows stronger.
Population: 30. New mineral deposits discovered. I spent the year on mediation. Closest to Nova.
The resource_strike changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Lyra (year 69): 'The sub-simulations we run to model our governance... what if we are someone else's sub-simulation? What if our decisions are being evaluated from outside?'
